name: Steam Trap Energy Loss Calculator
description: Calculates the energy and cost losses from failed steam traps based on orifice size, steam pressure, and operating hours, following ISO 50001 and Six Sigma DMAIC principles.

inputs.label: Orifice Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the trap orifice; typical failed traps have orifices from 1 mm to 20 mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trap orifis çapı; tipik arızalı traplarda orifis 1 mm ile 20 mm arasındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Kondensatableiteröffnung; typische defekte Ableiter haben Öffnungen von 1 mm bis 20 mm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre de l'orifice du purgeur ; les purgeurs défaillants typiques ont des orifices de 1 mm à 20 mm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro del orificio de la trampa; las trampas típicas falladas tienen orificios de 1 mm a 20 mm.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطر فتحة المصيدة؛ عادةً ما تكون فتحات المصائد المعطلة من 1 مم إلى 20 مم.

inputs.label: Steam Pressure (gauge)
inputs.businessContext: Gauge pressure of steam upstream of the trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gauge pressure of steam upstream of the trap. Common industrial range 3–15 bar_g.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trapin yukarı akışındaki buharın gösterge basıncı. Yaygın endüstriyel aralık 3–15 bar_g.
businessContext_i18n.de: Überdruck des Dampfes vor dem Ableiter. Üblicher Industriebereich 3–15 bar_ü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression manométrique de la vapeur en amont du purgeur. Plage industrielle courante 3–15 bar_g.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión manométrica del vapor aguas arriba de la trampa. Rango industrial común 3–15 bar_g.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضغط البخار المقاس قبل المصيدة. النطاق الصناعي الشائع 3–15 بار_مقياس.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating hours of the steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating hours of the steam system. Typical continuous process: 8000 h/yr.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Buhar sisteminin yıllık çalışma saati. Tipik sürekli proses: 8000 h/yıl.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Betriebsstunden des Dampfsystems. Typischer kontinuierlicher Prozess: 8000 h/Jahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de fonctionnement annuelles du système vapeur. Processus continu typique : 8000 h/an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas anuales de operación del sistema de vapor. Proceso continuo típico: 8000 h/año.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ساعات التشغيل السنوية لنظام البخار. العملية المستمرة النموذجية: 8000 ساعة/سنة.

inputs.label: Steam Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to generate one metric tonne of steam, including fuel, water treatment, and maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to generate one metric tonne of steam, including fuel, water treatment, and maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt, su arıtma ve bakım dahil olmak üzere bir metrik ton buhar üretme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten zur Erzeugung einer metrischen Tonne Dampf, einschließlich Brennstoff, Wasseraufbereitung und Wartung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de production d'une tonne métrique de vapeur, incluant le combustible, le traitement de l'eau et la maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de generar una tonelada métrica de vapor, incluyendo combustible, tratamiento de agua y mantenimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة توليد طن متري واحد من البخار، بما في ذلك الوقود ومعالجة المياه والصيانة.

inputs.label: Trap Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of steam trap influences discharge coefficient and failure mode.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Buhar trap türü, boşaltma katsayısını ve arıza modunu etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Kondensatableitertyp beeinflusst den Ausflusskoeffizienten und die Fehlerart.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le type de purgeur influence le coefficient de décharge et le mode de défaillance.
businessContext_i18n.es: El tipo de trampa de vapor influye en el coeficiente de descarga y el modo de fallo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نوع مصيدة البخار يؤثر على معامل التصريف وطريقة الفشل.

inputs.label: Failure Mode
inputs.businessContext: Failure mode determines effective orifice area and discharge coefficient.

businessContext_i18n.en: Failure mode determines effective orifice area and discharge coefficient.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arıza modu, etkili orifis alanını ve boşaltma katsayısını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Fehlerart bestimmt die wirksame Öffnungsfläche und den Ausflusskoeffizienten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le mode de défaillance détermine la surface d'orifice effective et le coefficient de décharge.
businessContext_i18n.es: El modo de fallo determina el área efectiva del orificio y el coeficiente de descarga.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نمط الفشل يحدد مساحة الفتحة الفعالة ومعامل التصريف.

inputs.label: Condensate Recovery
inputs.businessContext: Whether condensate is recovered; affects net energy loss calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Whether condensate is recovered; affects net energy loss calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kondensin geri kazanılıp kazanılmadığı; net enerji kaybı hesaplamasını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob Kondensat zurückgewonnen wird; beeinflusst die Berechnung des Nettoenergieverlusts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si les condensats sont récupérés ; affecte le calcul de la perte d'énergie nette.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si se recupera el condensado; afecta el cálculo de la pérdida neta de energía.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ما إذا كان يتم استرداد المكثفات؛ يؤثر على حساب فقدان الطاقة الصافي.

rules.message: Orifice diameter is unusually large for the given steam pressure. Check input values.
High operating hours with very low steam cost may indicate unrealistic assumptions.

thresholds.message: Annual energy loss exceeds 500,000 kWh. Immediate trap replacement recommended.
Annual cost loss exceeds $100,000. Perform root cause analysis (Six Sigma DMAIC).

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
